title: elho Greenville Round 20 - Flower Pot with Integrated Water Reservoir - Indoor & Outdoor - 100% Recycled Plastic - Ø 19.5 x H 18.4 cm - Purple/Vintage Plum
features: INCLUDING SAUCER | Greenville proves that looks and practical design can go very well together. The plant pot has a sleek design and a smart, integrated dish. So that you don’t need to worry about giving too much or too little water.

DURABLE | The pot is built for extensive and long-term use. Both indoor and outdoor, the colour stays vibrant and it can handle a bit of dirt and rough handling; which is why you get a 3-year warranty.
MIX & MATCH | This flower pot for indoor and outdoor is available in various colours and sizes that go together very nicely. This way, you can find the perfect pot for any space and every plant.
RECYCLED PLASTIC | The pot is made of 100% recycled plastic, produced using wind energy and is 100% recyclable.

BRING NATURE INSIDE | With an Elho product, you bring a bit of nature into your home. And that is a great feeling! Because, did you know that plants make you happy, make you feel healthier and give you a boost of energy? Enjoy!
description: Whether you want to plant a single plant or green up your entire garden, our greenville flower pots are the right choice. The flower pots are available in various natural colours and sizes. Their sleek design will fit perfectly in your garden. Thanks to the integrated water reservoir, you can look after your plants without any effort. This flowerpot can be used for indoor and outdoor. You can trust that our love for nature is reflected in how this pot was produced: it’s made from recycled plastic, produced with wind energy from our own windmill, and it’s also fully recyclable. The colour stays vibrant and it can handle a bit of dirt and rough handling; you get a 3-year warranty. Bring home to nature with elho!
